        return StandardsConfiguration(
            project_name="XPMotors_iOS",
            language="mixed",
            include_patterns=[
                "**/*.swift",
                "**/*.h",
                "**/*.m",
                "**/*.mm",
                "**/*.cpp",
                "**/*.cc"
            ],
            exclude_patterns=[
                "**/Pods/**",
                "**/build/**",
                "**/DerivedData/**",
                "**/.git/**",
                "**/Carthage/**",
                "**/LocalPods/**/ThirdParty/**"
            ],
            enabled_rules=[
                "swift_naming_conventions",
                "objc_naming_conventions",
                "file_header_format",
                "import_organization",
                "no_hardcoded_strings",
                "memory_management",
                "thread_safety_checks",
                "api_usage_patterns"
            ]
        )

    def _load_default_rules(self) -> List[StandardRule]:
        """加载默认的小鹏iOS代码规范"""
        rules = []

        # Swift命名规范
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="swift_naming_conventions",
            name="Swift命名规范",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查Swift类名、方法名、属性名是否符合驼峰命名规范",
            severity=SeverityLevel.WARNING,
            pattern=r"(class|struct|enum|protocol)\s+([a-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift"],
            tags=["naming", "swift"],
            documentation_url="https://xiaopeng.feishu.cn/docs/swift-naming"
        ))

        # Objective-C命名规范
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="objc_naming_conventions",
            name="Objective-C命名规范",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查Objective-C类名是否以XP前缀开头",
            severity=SeverityLevel.ERROR,
            pattern=r"@interface\s+(?!XP)[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*",
            file_patterns=["**/*.h", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["naming", "objective-c"],
            documentation_url="https://xiaopeng.feishu.cn/docs/objc-naming"
        ))

        # 文件头注释格式
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="file_header_format",
            name="文件头注释格式",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查文件头部是否包含版权信息和创建时间",
            severity=SeverityLevel.WARNING,
            pattern=r"^//\s*Copyright.*XPeng",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["header", "copyright"]
        ))

        # Import组织规范
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="import_organization",
            name="Import组织规范",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查import语句的组织方式",

            pattern=r"^import\s+",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["imports", "organization"]

                code_snippet=line.strip() if line.strip() else "(empty line)",
                suggested_fix="添加: // Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.",
                severity=rule.severity,
                source=ViolationSource.STATIC_ANALYSIS
            ))

        return violations

    def _check_pattern(self, line: str, line_num: int, file_path: Path, rule: StandardRule) -> List[ViolationInstance]:
        """通用模式检查"""
        violations = []

        if rule.pattern and re.search(rule.pattern, line):
            violations.append(ViolationInstance(
                rule_id=rule.id,
                file_path=str(file_path),
                line_number=line_num,
                message=rule.description,
                code_snippet=line.strip(),
                severity=rule.severity,
                source=ViolationSource.STATIC_ANALYSIS
            ))

        return violations

    def _get_rule_by_id(self, rule_id: str) -> Optional[StandardRule]:
        """根据ID获取规则"""
        for rule in self.rules:
            if rule.id == rule_id:
                return rule
        return None

    def _generate_recommendations(self, violations: List[ViolationInstance]) -> List[str]:
        """基于违规情况生成修复建议"""
        recommendations = []

        # 统计违规类型
        violation_counts = {}
        for violation in violations:
            rule_id = violation.rule_id
            violation_counts[rule_id] = violation_counts.get(rule_id, 0) + 1

        # 生成针对性建议
        if violation_counts.get("objc_naming_conventions", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议统一为Objective-C类添加'XP'前缀，参考命名规范文档")

        if violation_counts.get("swift_naming_conventions", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议使用驼峰命名法，确保类名以大写字母开头")

        if violation_counts.get("file_header_format", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议为所有源文件添加统一的版权声明头部")

        if violation_counts.get("memory_management", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议迁移到ARC，避免手动内存管理")

        return recommendations

    def get_enabled_rules(self) -> List[StandardRule]:
        """获取启用的规则列表"""
        return [rule for rule in self.rules if rule.id in self.config.enabled_rules and rule.enabled]

    def add_custom_rule(self, rule: StandardRule) -> bool:
        """添加自定义规则"""
        # 检查规则ID是否已存在
        if any(r.id == rule.id for r in self.rules):
            return False

        self.rules.append(rule)
        self.config.custom_rules.append(rule)
        return True

    def update_rule_status(self, rule_id: str, enabled: bool) -> bool:
        """更新规则状态"""
        rule = self._get_rule_by_id(rule_id)
        if not rule:
            return False

        rule.enabled = enabled
        rule.updated_at = datetime.now()

        # 更新配置
        if enabled and rule_id not in self.config.enabled_rules:
            self.config.enabled_rules.append(rule_id)
        elif not enabled and rule_id in self.config.enabled_rules:
            self.config.enabled_rules.remove(rule_id)

        return True

import pytest
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

from scripts.standards_validator import StandardsValidator
from scripts.models.standards_model import (
    StandardRule, StandardType, SeverityLevel, ViolationSource
)

class TestStandardsValidator:

    def setup_method(self):
        """设置测试环境"""
        self.validator = StandardsValidator()
        self.temp_dir = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())

    def teardown_method(self):
        """清理测试环境"""
        # 清理临时文件
        import shutil
        if self.temp_dir.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(self.temp_dir)

    def create_test_file(self, filename: str, content: str) -> Path:
        """创建测试文件"""
        file_path = self.temp_dir / filename
        file_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(content)
        return file_path

    def test_swift_naming_convention_violation(self):
        """测试Swift命名规范违规检测"""
        content = """
class myViewController: UIViewController {
    func viewDidLoad() {
        super.viewDidLoad()
    }
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestViewController.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到类名命名违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0
        assert "myViewController" in naming_violations[0].message
        assert naming_violations[0].severity == SeverityLevel.WARNING

    def test_objc_naming_convention_violation(self):
        """测试Objective-C命名规范违规检测"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface CarController : NSObject

@property (nonatomic, strong) NSString *carModel;

@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("CarController.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到类名没有XP前缀
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "objc_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0
        assert "CarController" in naming_violations[0].message
        assert naming_violations[0].severity == SeverityLevel.ERROR

    def test_objc_naming_convention_valid(self):
        """测试Objective-C命名规范正确情况"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPCarController : NSObject

@property (nonatomic, strong) NSString *carModel;

@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPCarController.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 正确的命名不应该有违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "objc_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) == 0

    def test_file_header_format_violation(self):
        """测试文件头格式违规检测"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPTestClass : NSObject
@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPTestClass.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到缺少版权声明
        header_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "file_header_format"]
        assert len(header_violations) > 0
        assert "版权声明" in header_violations[0].message

    def test_file_header_format_valid(self):
        """测试文件头格式正确情况"""
        content = """// Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.
//
// Created by Test on 2024/03/23.

#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPTestClass : NSObject
@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPTestClass.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 正确的版权声明不应该有违规
        header_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "file_header_format"]
        assert len(header_violations) == 0

    def test_project_validation(self):
        """测试整个项目验证功能"""
        # 创建项目结构
        self.create_test_file("ViewController.swift", """
class myViewController: UIViewController {
}
""")

        self.create_test_file("Models/CarController.h", """
@interface CarController : NSObject
@end
""")

        self.create_test_file("LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK/XPVehicle.h", """
// Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.
@interface XPVehicle : NSObject
@end
""")

        # 创建应该被排除的文件
        excluded_dir = self.temp_dir / "Pods" / "AFNetworking"
        excluded_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
        (excluded_dir / "AFNetworking.h").write_text("@interface AFNetworking : NSObject\n@end")

        # 执行项目验证
        report = self.validator.validate_project(str(self.temp_dir))

        # 验证报告内容
        assert report.scanned_files > 0  # 至少扫描了一些文件
        assert report.total_violations > 0  # 应该有违规
        assert report.scan_duration_ms > 0  # 有扫描耗时

        # 检查违规分布
        assert SeverityLevel.ERROR in report.violations_by_severity
        assert SeverityLevel.WARNING in report.violations_by_severity

        # 验证建议
        assert len(report.recommendations) > 0

        # 验证排除逻辑：Pods目录下的文件不应该被扫描
        pod_violations = [v for v in report.violations if "/Pods/" in v.file_path]
        assert len(pod_violations) == 0

    def test_custom_rule_addition(self):
        """测试自定义规则添加"""
        custom_rule = StandardRule(
            id="custom_test_rule",
            name="测试自定义规则",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检测测试模式",
            severity=SeverityLevel.INFO,
            pattern=r"// TODO:",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift"]
        )

        # 添加自定义规则
        result = self.validator.add_custom_rule(custom_rule)
        assert result == True

        # 启用自定义规则
        self.validator.config.enabled_rules.append("custom_test_rule")

        # 创建包含TODO的文件
        content = """
// TODO: 实现这个功能
class TestClass {
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestClass.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到自定义规则违规
        custom_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "custom_test_rule"]
        assert len(custom_violations) > 0

    def test_rule_status_update(self):
        """测试规则状态更新"""
        # 禁用一个默认启用的规则
        result = self.validator.update_rule_status("swift_naming_conventions", False)
        assert result == True

        # 创建有命名问题的Swift文件
        content = "class myViewController: UIViewController {}"
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestViewController.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 被禁用的规则不应该产生违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) == 0

        # 重新启用规则
        result = self.validator.update_rule_status("swift_naming_conventions", True)
        assert result == True

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 重新启用后应该检测到违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0

    def test_file_filtering(self):
        """测试文件过滤逻辑"""
        # 创建各种类型的文件
        files_to_test = [
            ("ViewController.swift", True),  # 应该被包含
            ("Model.h", True),               # 应该被包含
            ("Implementation.m", True),      # 应该被包含
            ("Pods/AFNetworking/AFNetworking.h", False),  # 应该被排除
            ("build/Debug/App.app", False),  # 应该被排除
            ("README.md", False),            # 应该被排除
        ]

        for filename, should_include in files_to_test:
            file_path = self.temp_dir / filename
            file_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            file_path.write_text("// Test content")

        # 获取要扫描的文件
        files_to_scan = self.validator._get_files_to_scan(self.temp_dir)
        scanned_filenames = [f.name for f in files_to_scan]

        # 验证过滤结果
        for filename, should_include in files_to_test:
            file_basename = Path(filename).name
            if should_include:
                assert file_basename in scanned_filenames, f"{filename} should be included"
            else:
                assert file_basename not in scanned_filenames, f"{filename} should be excluded"

    def test_violation_severity_distribution(self):
        """测试违规严重程度分布"""
        # 创建包含不同严重程度违规的文件
        content = """
@interface CarController : NSObject  // ERROR: 缺少XP前缀
@end

class myClass {  // WARNING: Swift命名不规范
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestFile.m", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 统计严重程度
        error_count = len([v for v in violations if v.severity == SeverityLevel.ERROR])
        warning_count = len([v for v in violations if v.severity == SeverityLevel.WARNING])

        assert error_count > 0  # 应该有错误级别违规
        assert warning_count >= 0  # 可能有警告级别违规

    def test_enabled_rules_getter(self):
        """测试获取启用规则列表"""
        enabled_rules = self.validator.get_enabled_rules()

        # 验证返回的都是启用的规则
        for rule in enabled_rules:
            assert rule.enabled == True
            assert rule.id in self.validator.config.enabled_rules

        # 验证数量合理
        assert len(enabled_rules) > 0
        assert len(enabled_rules) <= len(self.validator.rules)

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Any, Union
from enum import Enum
from datetime import datetime

class StandardType(Enum):
    """标准类型枚举"""
    CODE_STYLE = "code_style"
    ARCHITECTURE = "architecture"
    SECURITY = "security"
    AI_USAGE = "ai_usage"
    GIT_WORKFLOW = "git_workflow"

class SeverityLevel(Enum):
    """违规严重程度"""
    ERROR = "error"       # 必须修复
    WARNING = "warning"   # 建议修复
    INFO = "info"         # 信息提示

class ViolationSource(Enum):
    """违规来源"""
    STATIC_ANALYSIS = "static_analysis"
    DYNAMIC_CHECK = "dynamic_check"
    AI_ANALYSIS = "ai_analysis"
    MANUAL_REVIEW = "manual_review"

@dataclass
class StandardRule:
    """标准规则定义"""
    id: str
    name: str
    type: StandardType
    description: str
    severity: SeverityLevel

    # 规则检查相关
    enabled: bool = True
    pattern: Optional[str] = None         # 正则表达式或检查模式
    file_patterns: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # 适用文件模式
    exclude_patterns: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # 排除文件模式

    # 元数据
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    documentation_url: Optional[str] = None
    created_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    updated_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)

@dataclass
class ViolationInstance:
    """违规实例"""
    rule_id: str
    file_path: str
    line_number: int
    column_number: Optional[int] = None

    # 违规内容
    message: str
    code_snippet: Optional[str] = None
    suggested_fix: Optional[str] = None

    # 上下文信息
    severity: SeverityLevel = SeverityLevel.WARNING
    source: ViolationSource = ViolationSource.STATIC_ANALYSIS
    confidence: float = 1.0  # 置信度 0-1

    # 元数据
    detected_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    additional_context: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)

@dataclass
class StandardsViolationReport:
    """标准违规报告"""
    project_path: str
    scan_timestamp: datetime

    # 违规统计
    total_violations: int
    violations_by_severity: Dict[SeverityLevel, int]
    violations_by_type: Dict[StandardType, int]

    # 详细违规列表
    violations: List[ViolationInstance] = field(default_factory=list)

    # 扫描统计
    scanned_files: int = 0
    scan_duration_ms: int = 0

    # 修复建议
    recommendations: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

@dataclass
class StandardsConfiguration:
    """标准配置"""
    project_name: str
    language: str  # swift, objective-c, mixed

    # 规则配置
    enabled_rules: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    disabled_rules: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    custom_rules: List[StandardRule] = field(default_factory=list)

    # 文件过滤
    include_patterns: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    exclude_patterns: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    # 严重程度配置
    fail_on_error: bool = True
    fail_on_warning: bool = False

    # 输出配置
    output_format: str = "json"  # json, xml, text
    max_violations_per_file: int = 100

    # 元数据
    version: str = "1.0.0"
    last_updated: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)

@dataclass
class FeishuDocument:
    """飞书文档引用"""
    doc_id: str
    title: str
    url: str
    section: Optional[str] = None
    last_synced: Optional[datetime] = None
    checksum: Optional[str] = None  # 用于检测文档变更

@dataclass
class StandardsSync:
    """标准同步状态"""
    feishu_documents: List[FeishuDocument] = field(default_factory=list)
    last_sync_timestamp: Optional[datetime] = None
    sync_status: str = "pending"  # pending, syncing, success, error
    sync_errors: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    # 同步统计
    rules_added: int = 0
    rules_updated: int = 0
    rules_removed: int = 0

import re
import os
import time
import hashlib
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Set, Any
from datetime import datetime

from scripts.models.standards_model import (
    StandardRule, ViolationInstance, StandardsViolationReport, StandardsConfiguration,
    StandardType, SeverityLevel, ViolationSource, FeishuDocument, StandardsSync
)

class StandardsValidator:
    """代码标准验证器"""

    def __init__(self, config_path: Optional[str] = None):
        self.config = self._load_configuration(config_path)
        self.rules = self._load_default_rules()
        self._file_cache: Dict[str, str] = {}
        self._violation_cache: Dict[str, List[ViolationInstance]] = {}

    def _load_configuration(self, config_path: Optional[str]) -> StandardsConfiguration:
        """加载标准配置"""
        if config_path and Path(config_path).exists():
            # 后续可以实现从YAML文件加载配置
            pass

        # 返回默认的小鹏iOS项目配置
        return StandardsConfiguration(
            project_name="XPMotors_iOS",
            language="mixed",
            include_patterns=[
                "**/*.swift",
                "**/*.h",
                "**/*.m",
                "**/*.mm",
                "**/*.cpp",
                "**/*.cc"
            ],
            exclude_patterns=[
                "**/Pods/**",
                "**/build/**",
                "**/DerivedData/**",
                "**/.git/**",
                "**/Carthage/**",
                "**/LocalPods/**/ThirdParty/**"
            ],
            enabled_rules=[
                "swift_naming_conventions",
                "objc_naming_conventions",
                "file_header_format",
                "import_organization",
                "no_hardcoded_strings",
                "memory_management",
                "thread_safety_checks",
                "api_usage_patterns"
            ]
        )

    def _load_default_rules(self) -> List[StandardRule]:
        """加载默认的小鹏iOS代码规范"""
        rules = []

        # Swift命名规范
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="swift_naming_conventions",
            name="Swift命名规范",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查Swift类名、方法名、属性名是否符合驼峰命名规范",
            severity=SeverityLevel.WARNING,
            pattern=r"(class|struct|enum|protocol)\s+([a-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift"],
            tags=["naming", "swift"],
            documentation_url="https://xiaopeng.feishu.cn/docs/swift-naming"
        ))

        # Objective-C命名规范
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="objc_naming_conventions",
            name="Objective-C命名规范",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查Objective-C类名是否以XP前缀开头",
            severity=SeverityLevel.ERROR,
            pattern=r"@interface\s+(?!XP)[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*",
            file_patterns=["**/*.h", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["naming", "objective-c"],
            documentation_url="https://xiaopeng.feishu.cn/docs/objc-naming"
        ))

        # 文件头注释格式
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="file_header_format",
            name="文件头注释格式",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查文件头部是否包含版权信息和创建时间",
            severity=SeverityLevel.WARNING,
            pattern=r"^//\s*Copyright.*XPeng",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["header", "copyright"]
        ))

        # Import组织规范
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="import_organization",
            name="Import组织规范",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检查import语句的组织方式",
            severity=SeverityLevel.INFO,
            pattern=r"^import\s+",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["imports", "organization"]
        ))

        # 硬编码字符串检查
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="no_hardcoded_strings",
            name="避免硬编码字符串",
            type=StandardType.ARCHITECTURE,
            description="检查代码中的硬编码字符串，应使用本地化文件",
            severity=SeverityLevel.WARNING,
            pattern=r'NSLocalizedString\s*\(\s*@?"[^"]+"\s*,',
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["localization", "hardcoded"]
        ))

        # 内存管理检查
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="memory_management",
            name="内存管理检查",
            type=StandardType.SECURITY,
            description="检查可能的内存泄漏风险",
            severity=SeverityLevel.ERROR,
            pattern=r"(retain|release|autorelease)(?!\s*/)",
            file_patterns=["**/*.m", "**/*.mm"],
            tags=["memory", "arc"]
        ))

        # 线程安全检查
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="thread_safety_checks",
            name="线程安全检查",
            type=StandardType.SECURITY,
            description="检查UI操作是否在主线程执行",
            severity=SeverityLevel.ERROR,
            pattern=r"dispatch_async\s*\(\s*dispatch_get_main_queue\(\)",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["threading", "ui-safety"]
        ))

        # API使用模式检查
        rules.append(StandardRule(
            id="api_usage_patterns",
            name="API使用模式检查",
            type=StandardType.ARCHITECTURE,
            description="检查小鹏特定API的使用模式",
            severity=SeverityLevel.WARNING,
            pattern=r"XPRouter\.|XPCarInfo\.|XPStatistics\.",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift", "**/*.m"],
            tags=["api", "xiaopeng"]
        ))

        return rules

    def validate_project(self, project_path: str) -> StandardsViolationReport:
        """验证整个项目的标准符合性"""
        start_time = time.time()
        project_path = Path(project_path)

        # 获取要扫描的文件
        files_to_scan = self._get_files_to_scan(project_path)

        # 执行验证
        all_violations = []
        scanned_files = 0

        for file_path in files_to_scan:
            try:
                violations = self._validate_file(file_path)
                all_violations.extend(violations)
                scanned_files += 1
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"Warning: Failed to scan {file_path}: {e}")

        # 生成报告
        scan_duration_ms = int((time.time() - start_time) * 1000)

        # 统计违规
        violations_by_severity = {level: 0 for level in SeverityLevel}
        violations_by_type = {standard_type: 0 for standard_type in StandardType}

        for violation in all_violations:
            violations_by_severity[violation.severity] += 1
            # 根据规则ID找到规则类型
            rule = self._get_rule_by_id(violation.rule_id)
            if rule:
                violations_by_type[rule.type] += 1

        # 生成修复建议
        recommendations = self._generate_recommendations(all_violations)

        return StandardsViolationReport(
            project_path=str(project_path),
            scan_timestamp=datetime.now(),
            total_violations=len(all_violations),
            violations_by_severity=violations_by_severity,
            violations_by_type=violations_by_type,
            violations=all_violations,
            scanned_files=scanned_files,
            scan_duration_ms=scan_duration_ms,
            recommendations=recommendations
        )

    def _get_files_to_scan(self, project_path: Path) -> List[Path]:
        """获取需要扫描的文件列表"""
        files = []

        for pattern in self.config.include_patterns:
            matched_files = list(project_path.glob(pattern))
            files.extend(matched_files)

        # 过滤掉排除的文件
        filtered_files = []
        for file_path in files:
            should_exclude = False
            rel_path = file_path.relative_to(project_path)

            for exclude_pattern in self.config.exclude_patterns:
                if rel_path.match(exclude_pattern.replace('**/', '')):
                    should_exclude = True
                    break

            if not should_exclude and file_path.is_file():
                filtered_files.append(file_path)

        return filtered_files

    def _validate_file(self, file_path: Path) -> List[ViolationInstance]:
        """验证单个文件"""
        violations = []

        # 读取文件内容
        try:
            with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                content = f.read()
        except UnicodeDecodeError:
            # 尝试其他编码
            try:
                with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='gbk') as f:
                    content = f.read()
            except:
                return violations  # 跳过无法读取的文件

        # 对每个启用的规则进行检查
        for rule in self.rules:
            if rule.id in self.config.enabled_rules and rule.enabled:
                # 检查文件是否匹配规则的文件模式
                if self._file_matches_rule(file_path, rule):
                    rule_violations = self._check_rule(content, file_path, rule)
                    violations.extend(rule_violations)

        return violations

    def _file_matches_rule(self, file_path: Path, rule: StandardRule) -> bool:
        """检查文件是否匹配规则的适用模式"""
        if not rule.file_patterns:
            return True  # 无限制，适用所有文件

        for pattern in rule.file_patterns:
            if file_path.match(pattern.replace('**/', '')):
                return True

        return False

    def _check_rule(self, content: str, file_path: Path, rule: StandardRule) -> List[ViolationInstance]:
        """检查特定规则"""
        violations = []

        if not rule.pattern:
            return violations

        lines = content.split('\n')

        for line_num, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
            if rule.id == "swift_naming_conventions":
                violations.extend(self._check_swift_naming(line, line_num, file_path, rule))
            elif rule.id == "objc_naming_conventions":
                violations.extend(self._check_objc_naming(line, line_num, file_path, rule))
            elif rule.id == "file_header_format":
                if line_num <= 10:  # 只检查前10行
                    violations.extend(self._check_file_header(line, line_num, file_path, rule))
            else:
                # 通用正则表达式检查
                violations.extend(self._check_pattern(line, line_num, file_path, rule))

        return violations

    def _check_swift_naming(self, line: str, line_num: int, file_path: Path, rule: StandardRule) -> List[ViolationInstance]:
        """检查Swift命名规范"""
        violations = []
        pattern = re.compile(r"(class|struct|enum|protocol)\s+([a-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)")
        match = pattern.search(line)

        if match:
            type_name, name = match.groups()
            violations.append(ViolationInstance(
                rule_id=rule.id,
                file_path=str(file_path),
                line_number=line_num,
                message=f"Swift {type_name} 名称 '{name}' 应该以大写字母开头",
                code_snippet=line.strip(),
                suggested_fix=f"建议改为: {name.capitalize()}",
                severity=rule.severity,
                source=ViolationSource.STATIC_ANALYSIS
            ))

        return violations

    def _check_objc_naming(self, line: str, line_num: int, file_path: Path, rule: StandardRule) -> List[ViolationInstance]:
        """检查Objective-C命名规范"""
        violations = []
        pattern = re.compile(r"@interface\s+(?!XP)([A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)")
        match = pattern.search(line)

        if match:
            class_name = match.group(1)
            violations.append(ViolationInstance(
                rule_id=rule.id,
                file_path=str(file_path),
                line_number=line_num,
                message=f"Objective-C 类名 '{class_name}' 必须以 'XP' 前缀开头",
                code_snippet=line.strip(),
                suggested_fix=f"建议改为: XP{class_name}",
                severity=rule.severity,
                source=ViolationSource.STATIC_ANALYSIS
            ))

        return violations

    def _check_file_header(self, line: str, line_num: int, file_path: Path, rule: StandardRule) -> List[ViolationInstance]:
        """检查文件头注释格式"""
        violations = []

        if line_num == 1 and not re.search(r"//.*Copyright.*XPeng", line):
            violations.append(ViolationInstance(
                rule_id=rule.id,
                file_path=str(file_path),
                line_number=line_num,
                message="文件缺少小鹏版权声明",
                code_snippet=line.strip() if line.strip() else "(empty line)",
                suggested_fix="添加: // Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.",
                severity=rule.severity,
                source=ViolationSource.STATIC_ANALYSIS
            ))

        return violations

    def _check_pattern(self, line: str, line_num: int, file_path: Path, rule: StandardRule) -> List[ViolationInstance]:
        """通用模式检查"""
        violations = []

        if rule.pattern and re.search(rule.pattern, line):
            violations.append(ViolationInstance(
                rule_id=rule.id,
                file_path=str(file_path),
                line_number=line_num,
                message=rule.description,
                code_snippet=line.strip(),
                severity=rule.severity,
                source=ViolationSource.STATIC_ANALYSIS
            ))

        return violations

    def _get_rule_by_id(self, rule_id: str) -> Optional[StandardRule]:
        """根据ID获取规则"""
        for rule in self.rules:
            if rule.id == rule_id:
                return rule
        return None

    def _generate_recommendations(self, violations: List[ViolationInstance]) -> List[str]:
        """基于违规情况生成修复建议"""
        recommendations = []

        # 统计违规类型
        violation_counts = {}
        for violation in violations:
            rule_id = violation.rule_id
            violation_counts[rule_id] = violation_counts.get(rule_id, 0) + 1

        # 生成针对性建议
        if violation_counts.get("objc_naming_conventions", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议统一为Objective-C类添加'XP'前缀，参考命名规范文档")

        if violation_counts.get("swift_naming_conventions", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议使用驼峰命名法，确保类名以大写字母开头")

        if violation_counts.get("file_header_format", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议为所有源文件添加统一的版权声明头部")

        if violation_counts.get("memory_management", 0) > 0:
            recommendations.append("建议迁移到ARC，避免手动内存管理")

        return recommendations

    def get_enabled_rules(self) -> List[StandardRule]:
        """获取启用的规则列表"""
        return [rule for rule in self.rules if rule.id in self.config.enabled_rules and rule.enabled]

    def add_custom_rule(self, rule: StandardRule) -> bool:
        """添加自定义规则"""
        # 检查规则ID是否已存在
        if any(r.id == rule.id for r in self.rules):
            return False

        self.rules.append(rule)
        self.config.custom_rules.append(rule)
        return True

    def update_rule_status(self, rule_id: str, enabled: bool) -> bool:
        """更新规则状态"""
        rule = self._get_rule_by_id(rule_id)
        if not rule:
            return False

        rule.enabled = enabled
        rule.updated_at = datetime.now()

        # 更新配置
        if enabled and rule_id not in self.config.enabled_rules:
            self.config.enabled_rules.append(rule_id)
        elif not enabled and rule_id in self.config.enabled_rules:
            self.config.enabled_rules.remove(rule_id)

        return True

import pytest
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

from scripts.standards_validator import StandardsValidator
from scripts.models.standards_model import (
    StandardRule, StandardType, SeverityLevel, ViolationSource
)

class TestStandardsValidator:

    def setup_method(self):
        """设置测试环境"""
        self.validator = StandardsValidator()
        self.temp_dir = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())

    def teardown_method(self):
        """清理测试环境"""
        # 清理临时文件
        import shutil
        if self.temp_dir.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(self.temp_dir)

    def create_test_file(self, filename: str, content: str) -> Path:
        """创建测试文件"""
        file_path = self.temp_dir / filename
        file_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(content)
        return file_path

    def test_swift_naming_convention_violation(self):
        """测试Swift命名规范违规检测"""
        content = """
class myViewController: UIViewController {
    func viewDidLoad() {
        super.viewDidLoad()
    }
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestViewController.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到类名命名违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0
        assert "myViewController" in naming_violations[0].message
        assert naming_violations[0].severity == SeverityLevel.WARNING

    def test_objc_naming_convention_violation(self):
        """测试Objective-C命名规范违规检测"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface CarController : NSObject

@property (nonatomic, strong) NSString *carModel;

@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("CarController.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到类名没有XP前缀
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "objc_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0
        assert "CarController" in naming_violations[0].message
        assert naming_violations[0].severity == SeverityLevel.ERROR

    def test_objc_naming_convention_valid(self):
        """测试Objective-C命名规范正确情况"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPCarController : NSObject

@property (nonatomic, strong) NSString *carModel;

@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPCarController.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 正确的命名不应该有违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "objc_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) == 0

    def test_file_header_format_violation(self):
        """测试文件头格式违规检测"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPTestClass : NSObject
@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPTestClass.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到缺少版权声明
        header_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "file_header_format"]
        assert len(header_violations) > 0
        assert "版权声明" in header_violations[0].message

    def test_file_header_format_valid(self):
        """测试文件头格式正确情况"""
        content = """// Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.
//
// Created by Test on 2024/03/23.

#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPTestClass : NSObject
@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPTestClass.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 正确的版权声明不应该有违规
        header_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "file_header_format"]
        assert len(header_violations) == 0

    def test_project_validation(self):
        """测试整个项目验证功能"""
        # 创建项目结构
        self.create_test_file("ViewController.swift", """
class myViewController: UIViewController {
}
""")

        self.create_test_file("Models/CarController.h", """
@interface CarController : NSObject
@end
""")

        self.create_test_file("LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK/XPVehicle.h", """
// Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.
@interface XPVehicle : NSObject
@end
""")

        # 创建应该被排除的文件
        excluded_dir = self.temp_dir / "Pods" / "AFNetworking"
        excluded_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
        (excluded_dir / "AFNetworking.h").write_text("@interface AFNetworking : NSObject\n@end")

        # 执行项目验证
        report = self.validator.validate_project(str(self.temp_dir))

        # 验证报告内容
        assert report.scanned_files > 0  # 至少扫描了一些文件
        assert report.total_violations > 0  # 应该有违规
        assert report.scan_duration_ms > 0  # 有扫描耗时

        # 检查违规分布
        assert SeverityLevel.ERROR in report.violations_by_severity
        assert SeverityLevel.WARNING in report.violations_by_severity

        # 验证建议
        assert len(report.recommendations) > 0

        # 验证排除逻辑：Pods目录下的文件不应该被扫描
        pod_violations = [v for v in report.violations if "/Pods/" in v.file_path]
        assert len(pod_violations) == 0

    def test_custom_rule_addition(self):
        """测试自定义规则添加"""
        custom_rule = StandardRule(
            id="custom_test_rule",
            name="测试自定义规则",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检测测试模式",
            severity=SeverityLevel.INFO,
            pattern=r"// TODO:",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift"]
        )

        # 添加自定义规则
        result = self.validator.add_custom_rule(custom_rule)
        assert result == True

        # 启用自定义规则
        self.validator.config.enabled_rules.append("custom_test_rule")

        # 创建包含TODO的文件
        content = """
// TODO: 实现这个功能
class TestClass {
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestClass.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到自定义规则违规
        custom_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "custom_test_rule"]
        assert len(custom_violations) > 0

    def test_rule_status_update(self):
        """测试规则状态更新"""
        # 禁用一个默认启用的规则
        result = self.validator.update_rule_status("swift_naming_conventions", False)
        assert result == True

        # 创建有命名问题的Swift文件
        content = "class myViewController: UIViewController {}"
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestViewController.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 被禁用的规则不应该产生违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) == 0

        # 重新启用规则
        result = self.validator.update_rule_status("swift_naming_conventions", True)
        assert result == True

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 重新启用后应该检测到违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0

    def test_file_filtering(self):
        """测试文件过滤逻辑"""
        # 创建各种类型的文件
        files_to_test = [
            ("ViewController.swift", True),  # 应该被包含
            ("Model.h", True),               # 应该被包含
            ("Implementation.m", True),      # 应该被包含
            ("Pods/AFNetworking/AFNetworking.h", False),  # 应该被排除
            ("build/Debug/App.app", False),  # 应该被排除
            ("README.md", False),            # 应该被排除
        ]

        for filename, should_include in files_to_test:
            file_path = self.temp_dir / filename
            file_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            file_path.write_text("// Test content")

        # 获取要扫描的文件
        files_to_scan = self.validator._get_files_to_scan(self.temp_dir)
        scanned_filenames = [f.name for f in files_to_scan]

        # 验证过滤结果
        for filename, should_include in files_to_test:
            file_basename = Path(filename).name
            if should_include:
                assert file_basename in scanned_filenames, f"{filename} should be included"
            else:
                assert file_basename not in scanned_filenames, f"{filename} should be excluded"

    def test_violation_severity_distribution(self):
        """测试违规严重程度分布"""
        # 创建包含不同严重程度违规的文件
        content = """
@interface CarController : NSObject  // ERROR: 缺少XP前缀
@end

class myClass {  // WARNING: Swift命名不规范
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestFile.m", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 统计严重程度
        error_count = len([v for v in violations if v.severity == SeverityLevel.ERROR])
        warning_count = len([v for v in violations if v.severity == SeverityLevel.WARNING])

        assert error_count > 0  # 应该有错误级别违规
        assert warning_count >= 0  # 可能有警告级别违规

    def test_enabled_rules_getter(self):
        """测试获取启用规则列表"""
        enabled_rules = self.validator.get_enabled_rules()

        # 验证返回的都是启用的规则
        for rule in enabled_rules:
            assert rule.enabled == True
            assert rule.id in self.validator.config.enabled_rules

        # 验证数量合理
        assert len(enabled_rules) > 0
        assert len(enabled_rules) <= len(self.validator.rules)

        return file_path

    def test_swift_naming_convention_violation(self):
        """测试Swift命名规范违规检测"""
        content = """
class myViewController: UIViewController {
    func viewDidLoad() {
        super.viewDidLoad()
    }
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestViewController.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到类名命名违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0
        assert "myViewController" in naming_violations[0].message
        assert naming_violations[0].severity == SeverityLevel.WARNING

    def test_objc_naming_convention_violation(self):
        """测试Objective-C命名规范违规检测"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface CarController : NSObject

@property (nonatomic, strong) NSString *carModel;

@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("CarController.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到类名没有XP前缀
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "objc_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0
        assert "CarController" in naming_violations[0].message
        assert naming_violations[0].severity == SeverityLevel.ERROR

    def test_objc_naming_convention_valid(self):
        """测试Objective-C命名规范正确情况"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPCarController : NSObject

@property (nonatomic, strong) NSString *carModel;

@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPCarController.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 正确的命名不应该有违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "objc_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) == 0

    def test_file_header_format_violation(self):
        """测试文件头格式违规检测"""
        content = """
#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPTestClass : NSObject
@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPTestClass.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到缺少版权声明
        header_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "file_header_format"]
        assert len(header_violations) > 0
        assert "版权声明" in header_violations[0].message

    def test_file_header_format_valid(self):
        """测试文件头格式正确情况"""
        content = """// Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.
//
// Created by Test on 2024/03/23.

#import <Foundation/Foundation.h>

@interface XPTestClass : NSObject
@end
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("XPTestClass.h", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 正确的版权声明不应该有违规
        header_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "file_header_format"]
        assert len(header_violations) == 0

    def test_project_validation(self):
        """测试整个项目验证功能"""
        # 创建项目结构
        self.create_test_file("ViewController.swift", """
class myViewController: UIViewController {
}
""")

        self.create_test_file("Models/CarController.h", """
@interface CarController : NSObject
@end
""")

        self.create_test_file("LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK/XPVehicle.h", """
// Copyright © 2024 XPeng Inc. All rights reserved.
@interface XPVehicle : NSObject
@end
""")

        # 创建应该被排除的文件
        excluded_dir = self.temp_dir / "Pods" / "AFNetworking"
        excluded_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
        (excluded_dir / "AFNetworking.h").write_text("@interface AFNetworking : NSObject\n@end")

        # 执行项目验证
        report = self.validator.validate_project(str(self.temp_dir))

        # 验证报告内容
        assert report.scanned_files > 0  # 至少扫描了一些文件
        assert report.total_violations > 0  # 应该有违规
        assert report.scan_duration_ms >= 0  # 有扫描耗时（允许为0）

        # 检查违规分布
        assert SeverityLevel.ERROR in report.violations_by_severity
        assert SeverityLevel.WARNING in report.violations_by_severity

        # 验证建议
        assert len(report.recommendations) > 0

        # 验证排除逻辑：Pods目录下的文件不应该被扫描
        pod_violations = [v for v in report.violations if "/Pods/" in v.file_path]
        assert len(pod_violations) == 0

    def test_custom_rule_addition(self):
        """测试自定义规则添加"""
        custom_rule = StandardRule(
            id="custom_test_rule",
            name="测试自定义规则",
            type=StandardType.CODE_STYLE,
            description="检测测试模式",
            severity=SeverityLevel.INFO,
            pattern=r"// TODO:",
            file_patterns=["**/*.swift"]
        )

        # 添加自定义规则
        result = self.validator.add_custom_rule(custom_rule)
        assert result == True

        # 启用自定义规则
        self.validator.config.enabled_rules.append("custom_test_rule")

        # 创建包含TODO的文件
        content = """
// TODO: 实现这个功能
class TestClass {
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestClass.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 应该检测到自定义规则违规
        custom_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "custom_test_rule"]
        assert len(custom_violations) > 0

    def test_rule_status_update(self):
        """测试规则状态更新"""
        # 禁用一个默认启用的规则
        result = self.validator.update_rule_status("swift_naming_conventions", False)
        assert result == True

        # 创建有命名问题的Swift文件
        content = "class myViewController: UIViewController {}"
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestViewController.swift", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 被禁用的规则不应该产生违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) == 0

        # 重新启用规则
        result = self.validator.update_rule_status("swift_naming_conventions", True)
        assert result == True

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 重新启用后应该检测到违规
        naming_violations = [v for v in violations if v.rule_id == "swift_naming_conventions"]
        assert len(naming_violations) > 0

    def test_file_filtering(self):
        """测试文件过滤逻辑"""
        # 创建各种类型的文件
        files_to_test = [
            ("ViewController.swift", True),  # 应该被包含
            ("Model.h", True),               # 应该被包含
            ("Implementation.m", True),      # 应该被包含
            ("Pods/AFNetworking/AFNetworking.h", False),  # 应该被排除
            ("build/Debug/App.app", False),  # 应该被排除
            ("README.md", False),            # 应该被排除
        ]

        for filename, should_include in files_to_test:
            file_path = self.temp_dir / filename
            file_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            file_path.write_text("// Test content")

        # 获取要扫描的文件
        files_to_scan = self.validator._get_files_to_scan(self.temp_dir)
        scanned_filenames = [f.name for f in files_to_scan]

        # 验证过滤结果
        for filename, should_include in files_to_test:
            file_basename = Path(filename).name
            if should_include:
                assert file_basename in scanned_filenames, f"{filename} should be included"
            else:
                assert file_basename not in scanned_filenames, f"{filename} should be excluded"

    def test_violation_severity_distribution(self):
        """测试违规严重程度分布"""
        # 创建包含不同严重程度违规的文件
        content = """
@interface CarController : NSObject  // ERROR: 缺少XP前缀
@end

class myClass {  // WARNING: Swift命名不规范
}
"""
        file_path = self.create_test_file("TestFile.m", content)

        violations = self.validator._validate_file(file_path)

        # 统计严重程度
        error_count = len([v for v in violations if v.severity == SeverityLevel.ERROR])
        warning_count = len([v for v in violations if v.severity == SeverityLevel.WARNING])

        assert error_count > 0  # 应该有错误级别违规
        assert warning_count >= 0  # 可能有警告级别违规

    def test_enabled_rules_getter(self):
        """测试获取启用规则列表"""
        enabled_rules = self.validator.get_enabled_rules()

        # 验证返回的都是启用的规则
        for rule in enabled_rules:
            assert rule.enabled == True
            assert rule.id in self.validator.config.enabled_rules

        # 验证数量合理
        assert len(enabled_rules) > 0
        assert len(enabled_rules) <= len(self.validator.rules)

input.content:
import pytest
import tempfile
import json
from pathlib import Path
from unittest.mock import Mock, patch

from scripts.claude_code_adapter import ClaudeCodeAdapter

class TestClaudeCodeAdapter:

    def setup_method(self):
        """设置测试环境"""
        self.temp_dir = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
        self.adapter = ClaudeCodeAdapter(str(self.temp_dir))

        # 创建模拟项目结构
        self.create_mock_project()

    def teardown_method(self):
        """清理测试环境"""
        import shutil
        if self.temp_dir.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(self.temp_dir)

    def create_mock_project(self):
        """创建模拟项目结构"""
        # 创建Podfile
        podfile_content = """
platform :ios, '12.0'
use_frameworks!

target 'XPApp' do
  pod 'LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK', :path => './LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK'
  pod 'LocalPods/XPBusiness_AI', :path => './LocalPods/XPBusiness_AI'
  pod 'AFNetworking', '~> 4.0'
end
"""
        (self.temp_dir / "Podfile").write_text(podfile_content)

        # 创建LocalPods结构
        localpods_dir = self.temp_dir / "LocalPods"

        # XPVehicleSDK
        vehicle_sdk_dir = localpods_dir / "XPVehicleSDK"
        vehicle_sdk_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
        (vehicle_sdk_dir / "XPVehicleSDK.podspec").write_text("Pod::Spec.new do |s|\n  s.name = 'XPVehicleSDK'\nend")
        (vehicle_sdk_dir / "Classes" / "XPVehicle.h").parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
        (vehicle_sdk_dir / "Classes" / "XPVehicle.h").write_text("@interface XPVehicle : NSObject\n@end")

        # XPBusiness_AI
        business_ai_dir = localpods_dir / "XPBusiness_AI"
        business_ai_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
        (business_ai_dir / "XPBusiness_AI.podspec").write_text("Pod::Spec.new do |s|\n  s.name = 'XPBusiness_AI'\nend")
        (business_ai_dir / "Classes" / "XPAIManager.swift").parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
        (business_ai_dir / "Classes" / "XPAIManager.swift").write_text("class XPAIManager {\n}")

        # 主项目文件
        (self.temp_dir / "XPApp" / "ViewController.swift").parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
        (self.temp_dir / "XPApp" / "ViewController.swift").write_text("class ViewController: UIViewController {\n}")

    def test_initialize_project(self):
        """测试项目初始化"""
        result = self.adapter.initialize_project()

        assert result["status"] == "initialized"
        assert result["total_modules"] > 0
        assert "modules_by_type" in result
        assert "permission_matrix" in result

        # 验证项目信息被缓存
        assert self.adapter._project_info is not None

    @patch('scripts.architecture_scanner.ArchitectureScanner.scan_project')
    def test_initialize_project_error_handling(self, mock_scan):
        """测试项目初始化错误处理"""
        # 模拟扫描失败
        mock_scan.side_effect = Exception("扫描失败")

        result = self.adapter.initialize_project()

        assert result["status"] == "error"
        assert "扫描失败" in result["error"]

    def test_check_module_access_allowed(self):
        """测试模块访问权限检查 - 允许访问"""
        result = self.adapter.check_module_access(
            user_id="test_user",
            module_name="XPBusiness_AI",
            action="read"
        )

        assert result["allowed"] == True
        assert result["module"] == "XPBusiness_AI"
        assert result["action"] == "read"
        assert result["user_id"] == "test_user"

    def test_check_module_access_denied(self):
        """测试模块访问权限检查 - 拒绝访问"""
        # 使用受限用户上下文
        user_context = {
            "name": "测试用户",
            "roles": ["intern"],  # 实习生角色，权限受限
            "teams": ["intern-team"]
        }

        result = self.adapter.check_module_access(
            user_id="intern_user",
            module_name="XPVehicleSDK",
            action="write",
            user_context=user_context
        )

        # 由于实习生没有vehicle_sdk写权限，应该被拒绝
        # 注意：这里的结果取决于permission_checker的具体实现
        assert result["module"] == "XPVehicleSDK"
        assert result["action"] == "write"

    def test_validate_code_standards_specific_files(self):
        """测试特定文件的代码标准验证"""
        # 创建有问题的Swift文件
        test_file = self.temp_dir / "TestFile.swift"
        test_file.write_text("class badNaming {\n}")

        result = self.adapter.validate_code_standards([str(test_file)])

        assert result["status"] == "partial_scan"
        assert result["scanned_files"] == 1
        assert result["total_violations"] >= 0

    def test_validate_code_standards_full_project(self):
        """测试整个项目的代码标准验证"""
        result = self.adapter.validate_code_standards()

        assert "total_violations" in result
        assert "scanned_files" in result
        assert "status" in result

    def test_get_ai_coding_suggestions_vehicle_module(self):
        """测试车控模块AI编码建议"""
        result = self.adapter.get_ai_coding_suggestions({
            "module": "XPVehicleSDK",
            "action": "ai_assist",
            "user_id": "developer"
        })

        if result["allowed"]:
            suggestions = result["suggestions"]
            assert any("车控模块" in suggestion for suggestion in suggestions)
            assert any("线程安全" in suggestion for suggestion in suggestions)
        else:
            assert "reason" in result

    def test_get_ai_coding_suggestions_business_module(self):
        """测试业务模块AI编码建议"""
        result = self.adapter.get_ai_coding_suggestions({
            "module": "XPBusiness_AI",
            "action": "ai_assist",
            "user_id": "developer"
        })

        if result["allowed"]:
            suggestions = result["suggestions"]
            assert any("MVVM" in suggestion for suggestion in suggestions)

    def test_get_project_health_summary(self):
        """测试项目健康状态摘要"""
        result = self.adapter.get_project_health_summary()

        assert "health_score" in result
        assert "total_modules" in result
        assert "standards_violations" in result
        assert "status" in result
        assert 0 <= result["health_score"] <= 100

    def test_pre_tool_use_hook_write_permission(self):
        """测试工具使用前钩子 - 写权限检查"""
        # 测试Edit工具
        result = self.adapter.pre_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Edit",
            parameters={"file_path": "/LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK/Classes/XPVehicle.h"},
            context={"user_id": "test_user"}
        )

        assert "allowed" in result
        # 具体是否允许取决于权限配置

    def test_pre_tool_use_hook_non_restricted_tool(self):
        """测试工具使用前钩子 - 非受限工具"""
        result = self.adapter.pre_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Read",
            parameters={"file_path": "/some/file.txt"},
            context={"user_id": "test_user"}
        )

        assert result["allowed"] == True

    def test_post_tool_use_hook_source_file_validation(self):
        """测试工具使用后钩子 - 源文件验证"""
        # 创建一个Swift文件
        test_file = self.temp_dir / "TestClass.swift"
        test_file.write_text("class badNaming {\n}")

        result = self.adapter.post_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Write",
            parameters={"file_path": str(test_file)},
            result={"success": True},
            context={}
        )

        # 应该检测到命名问题
        assert "status" in result or "warning" in result

    def test_post_tool_use_hook_non_source_file(self):
        """测试工具使用后钩子 - 非源文件"""
        result = self.adapter.post_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Write",
            parameters={"file_path": "README.md"},
            result={"success": True},
            context={}
        )

        assert result["status"] == "ok"

    def test_extract_module_from_path(self):
        """测试从路径提取模块名"""
        test_cases = [
            ("LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK/Classes/XPVehicle.h", "XPVehicleSDK"),
            ("LocalPods/XPBusiness_AI/Sources/Manager.swift", "XPBusiness_AI"),
            ("XPApp/ViewController.swift", "XPApp"),
            ("", None),
            ("single_file.swift", None)
        ]

        for path, expected in test_cases:
            result = self.adapter._extract_module_from_path(path)
            assert result == expected, f"Path: {path}, Expected: {expected}, Got: {result}"

    def test_is_source_file(self):
        """测试源文件判断"""
        test_cases = [
            ("file.swift", True),
            ("file.h", True),
            ("file.m", True),
            ("file.mm", True),
            ("file.cpp", True),
            ("file.cc", True),
            ("file.txt", False),
            ("file.md", False),
            ("file.json", False),
            ("Podfile", False)
        ]

        for filename, expected in test_cases:
            result = self.adapter._is_source_file(filename)
            assert result == expected, f"File: {filename}, Expected: {expected}, Got: {result}"

    def test_build_user_context_with_context(self):
        """测试构建用户上下文 - 提供上下文"""
        user_context = {
            "name": "张三",
            "roles": ["senior_architect"],
            "teams": ["architecture-team"]
        }

        user = self.adapter._build_user_context("user001", user_context)

        assert user.id == "user001"
        assert user.name == "张三"
        assert user.roles == ["senior_architect"]
        assert user.teams == ["architecture-team"]

    def test_build_user_context_default(self):
        """测试构建用户上下文 - 默认配置"""
        user = self.adapter._build_user_context("claude_user")

        assert user.id == "claude_user"
        assert user.name == "Claude Code User"
        assert "business_developer" in user.roles
        assert "senior_architect" in user.roles

    def test_convert_action_string(self):
        """测试动作字符串转换"""
        test_cases = [
            ("read", "READ"),
            ("write", "WRITE"),
            ("ai_assist", "AI_ASSIST"),
            ("unknown", "AI_ASSIST")  # 默认为AI_ASSIST
        ]

        for action_str, expected_value in test_cases:
            result = self.adapter._convert_action_string(action_str)
            assert result.value.upper() == expected_value

    def test_calculate_health_score(self):
        """测试健康分数计算"""
        test_cases = [
            ({"total_violations": 0, "scanned_files": 10}, 100),  # 完美分数
            ({"total_violations": 5, "scanned_files": 10}, 95),   # 轻微违规
            ({"total_violations": 15, "scanned_files": 10}, 75),  # 中等违规
            ({"total_violations": 50, "scanned_files": 10}, 15),  # 严重违规
        ]

        for report, expected_range in test_cases:
            score = self.adapter._calculate_health_score(report)
            assert 0 <= score <= 100
            if isinstance(expected_range, int):
                assert abs(score - expected_range) <= 10  # 允许10分误差

    def test_get_module_coding_suggestions_categories(self):
        """测试不同模块类型的编码建议"""
        module_test_cases = [
            ("XPVehicleSDK", ["车控模块", "线程安全"]),
            ("XPBusiness_AI", ["MVVM", "网络请求"]),
            ("XPBase_Common", ["通用性", "业务逻辑"]),
            ("UnknownModule", ["编码规范", "单元测试"])
        ]

        for module, expected_keywords in module_test_cases:
            suggestions = self.adapter._get_module_coding_suggestions(module)

            # 检查是否包含预期关键词
            suggestion_text = " ".join(suggestions)
            for keyword in expected_keywords:
                assert keyword in suggestion_text, f"Module {module} should contain keyword '{keyword}'"

    @patch('scripts.standards_validator.StandardsValidator.validate_project')
    def test_validate_code_standards_error_handling(self, mock_validate):
        """测试代码标准验证错误处理"""
        mock_validate.side_effect = Exception("验证失败")

        result = self.adapter.validate_code_standards()

        assert result["status"] == "error"
        assert "验证失败" in result["error"]
        assert result["total_violations"] == 0

import pytest
import tempfile
import json
from pathlib import Path
from unittest.mock import Mock, patch

from scripts.claude_code_adapter import ClaudeCodeAdapter

class TestClaudeCodeAdapter:

    def setup_method(self):
        """设置测试环境"""
        self.temp_dir = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
        self.adapter = ClaudeCodeAdapter(str(self.temp_dir))

        # 创建模拟项目结构
        self.create_mock_project()

    def teardown_method(self):
        """清理测试环境"""
        import shutil
        if self.temp_dir.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(self.temp_dir)

    def create_mock_project(self):
        """创建模拟项目结构"""
        # 创建Podfile
        podfile_content = """
platform :ios, '12.0'
use_frameworks!

target 'XPApp' do
  pod 'LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK', :path => './LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK'
  pod 'LocalPods/XPBusiness_AI', :path => './LocalPods/XPBusiness_AI'
  pod 'AFNetworking', '~> 4.0'
end
"""
        (self.temp_dir / "Podfile").write_text(podfile_content)

        # 创建LocalPods结构
        localpods_dir = self.temp_dir / "LocalPods"

        # XPVehicleSDK
        vehicle_sdk_dir = localpods_dir / "XPVehicleSDK"
        vehicle_sdk_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
        (vehicle_sdk_dir / "XPVehicleSDK.podspec").write_text("Pod::Spec.new do |s|\n  s.name = 'XPVehicleSDK'\nend")
        (vehicle_sdk_dir / "Classes" / "XPVehicle.h").parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
        (vehicle_sdk_dir / "Classes" / "XPVehicle.h").write_text("@interface XPVehicle : NSObject\n@end")

        # XPBusiness_AI
        business_ai_dir = localpods_dir / "XPBusiness_AI"
        business_ai_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
        (business_ai_dir / "XPBusiness_AI.podspec").write_text("Pod::Spec.new do |s|\n  s.name = 'XPBusiness_AI'\nend")
        (business_ai_dir / "Classes" / "XPAIManager.swift").parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
        (business_ai_dir / "Classes" / "XPAIManager.swift").write_text("class XPAIManager {\n}")

        # 主项目文件
        (self.temp_dir / "XPApp" / "ViewController.swift").parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True, parents=True)
        (self.temp_dir / "XPApp" / "ViewController.swift").write_text("class ViewController: UIViewController {\n}")

    def test_initialize_project(self):
        """测试项目初始化"""
        result = self.adapter.initialize_project()

        assert result["status"] == "initialized"
        assert result["total_modules"] > 0
        assert "modules_by_type" in result
        assert "permission_matrix" in result

        # 验证项目信息被缓存
        assert self.adapter._project_info is not None

    @patch('scripts.architecture_scanner.ArchitectureScanner.scan_project')
    def test_initialize_project_error_handling(self, mock_scan):
        """测试项目初始化错误处理"""
        # 模拟扫描失败
        mock_scan.side_effect = Exception("扫描失败")

        result = self.adapter.initialize_project()

        assert result["status"] == "error"
        assert "扫描失败" in result["error"]

    def test_check_module_access_allowed(self):
        """测试模块访问权限检查 - 允许访问"""
        result = self.adapter.check_module_access(
            user_id="test_user",
            module_name="XPBusiness_AI",
            action="read"
        )

        assert result["allowed"] == True
        assert result["module"] == "XPBusiness_AI"
        assert result["action"] == "read"
        assert result["user_id"] == "test_user"

    def test_check_module_access_denied(self):
        """测试模块访问权限检查 - 拒绝访问"""
        # 使用受限用户上下文
        user_context = {
            "name": "测试用户",
            "roles": ["intern"],  # 实习生角色，权限受限
            "teams": ["intern-team"]
        }

        result = self.adapter.check_module_access(
            user_id="intern_user",
            module_name="XPVehicleSDK",
            action="write",
            user_context=user_context
        )

        # 由于实习生没有vehicle_sdk写权限，应该被拒绝
        # 注意：这里的结果取决于permission_checker的具体实现
        assert result["module"] == "XPVehicleSDK"
        assert result["action"] == "write"

    def test_validate_code_standards_specific_files(self):
        """测试特定文件的代码标准验证"""
        # 创建有问题的Swift文件
        test_file = self.temp_dir / "TestFile.swift"
        test_file.write_text("class badNaming {\n}")

        result = self.adapter.validate_code_standards([str(test_file)])

        assert result["status"] == "partial_scan"
        assert result["scanned_files"] == 1
        assert result["total_violations"] >= 0

    def test_validate_code_standards_full_project(self):
        """测试整个项目的代码标准验证"""
        result = self.adapter.validate_code_standards()

        assert "total_violations" in result
        assert "scanned_files" in result
        assert "status" in result

    def test_get_ai_coding_suggestions_vehicle_module(self):
        """测试车控模块AI编码建议"""
        result = self.adapter.get_ai_coding_suggestions({
            "module": "XPVehicleSDK",
            "action": "ai_assist",
            "user_id": "developer"
        })

        if result["allowed"]:
            suggestions = result["suggestions"]
            assert any("车控模块" in suggestion for suggestion in suggestions)
            assert any("线程安全" in suggestion for suggestion in suggestions)
        else:
            assert "reason" in result

    def test_get_ai_coding_suggestions_business_module(self):
        """测试业务模块AI编码建议"""
        result = self.adapter.get_ai_coding_suggestions({
            "module": "XPBusiness_AI",
            "action": "ai_assist",
            "user_id": "developer"
        })

        if result["allowed"]:
            suggestions = result["suggestions"]
            assert any("MVVM" in suggestion for suggestion in suggestions)

    def test_get_project_health_summary(self):
        """测试项目健康状态摘要"""
        result = self.adapter.get_project_health_summary()

        assert "health_score" in result
        assert "total_modules" in result
        assert "standards_violations" in result
        assert "status" in result
        assert 0 <= result["health_score"] <= 100

    def test_pre_tool_use_hook_write_permission(self):
        """测试工具使用前钩子 - 写权限检查"""
        # 测试Edit工具
        result = self.adapter.pre_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Edit",
            parameters={"file_path": "/LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK/Classes/XPVehicle.h"},
            context={"user_id": "test_user"}
        )

        assert "allowed" in result
        # 具体是否允许取决于权限配置

    def test_pre_tool_use_hook_non_restricted_tool(self):
        """测试工具使用前钩子 - 非受限工具"""
        result = self.adapter.pre_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Read",
            parameters={"file_path": "/some/file.txt"},
            context={"user_id": "test_user"}
        )

        assert result["allowed"] == True

    def test_post_tool_use_hook_source_file_validation(self):
        """测试工具使用后钩子 - 源文件验证"""
        # 创建一个Swift文件
        test_file = self.temp_dir / "TestClass.swift"
        test_file.write_text("class badNaming {\n}")

        result = self.adapter.post_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Write",
            parameters={"file_path": str(test_file)},
            result={"success": True},
            context={}
        )

        # 应该检测到命名问题
        assert "status" in result or "warning" in result

    def test_post_tool_use_hook_non_source_file(self):
        """测试工具使用后钩子 - 非源文件"""
        result = self.adapter.post_tool_use_hook(
            tool_name="Write",
            parameters={"file_path": "README.md"},
            result={"success": True},
            context={}
        )

        assert result["status"] == "ok"

    def test_extract_module_from_path(self):
        """测试从路径提取模块名"""
        test_cases = [
            ("LocalPods/XPVehicleSDK/Classes/XPVehicle.h", "XPVehicleSDK"),
            ("LocalPods/XPBusiness_AI/Sources/Manager.swift", "XPBusiness_AI"),
            ("XPApp/ViewController.swift", "XPApp"),
            ("", None),
            ("single_file.swift", None)
        ]

        for path, expected in test_cases:
            result = self.adapter._extract_module_from_path(path)
            assert result == expected, f"Path: {path}, Expected: {expected}, Got: {result}"

    def test_is_source_file(self):
        """测试源文件判断"""
        test_cases = [
            ("file.swift", True),
            ("file.h", True),
            ("file.m", True),
            ("file.mm", True),
            ("file.cpp", True),
            ("file.cc", True),
            ("file.txt", False),
            ("file.md", False),
            ("file.json", False),
            ("Podfile", False)
        ]

        for filename, expected in test_cases:
            result = self.adapter._is_source_file(filename)
            assert result == expected, f"File: {filename}, Expected: {expected}, Got: {result}"

    def test_build_user_context_with_context(self):
        """测试构建用户上下文 - 提供上下文"""
        user_context = {
            "name": "张三",
            "roles": ["senior_architect"],
            "teams": ["architecture-team"]
        }

        user = self.adapter._build_user_context("user001", user_context)

        assert user.id == "user001"
        assert user.name == "张三"
        assert user.roles == ["senior_architect"]
        assert user.teams == ["architecture-team"]

    def test_build_user_context_default(self):
        """测试构建用户上下文 - 默认配置"""
        user = self.adapter._build_user_context("claude_user")

        assert user.id == "claude_user"
        assert user.name == "Claude Code User"
        assert "business_developer" in user.roles
        assert "senior_architect" in user.roles

    def test_convert_action_string(self):
        """测试动作字符串转换"""
        test_cases = [
            ("read", "READ"),
            ("write", "WRITE"),
            ("ai_assist", "AI_ASSIST"),
            ("unknown", "AI_ASSIST")  # 默认为AI_ASSIST
        ]

        for action_str, expected_value in test_cases:
            result = self.adapter._convert_action_string(action_str)
            assert result.value.upper() == expected_value

    def test_calculate_health_score(self):
        """测试健康分数计算"""
        test_cases = [
            ({"total_violations": 0, "scanned_files": 10}, 100),  # 完美分数
            ({"total_violations": 5, "scanned_files": 10}, 95),   # 轻微违规
            ({"total_violations": 15, "scanned_files": 10}, 75),  # 中等违规
            ({"total_violations": 50, "scanned_files": 10}, 15),  # 严重违规
        ]

        for report, expected_range in test_cases:
            score = self.adapter._calculate_health_score(report)
            assert 0 <= score <= 100
            if isinstance(expected_range, int):
                assert abs(score - expected_range) <= 10  # 允许10分误差

    def test_get_module_coding_suggestions_categories(self):
        """测试不同模块类型的编码建议"""
        module_test_cases = [
            ("XPVehicleSDK", ["车控模块", "线程安全"]),
            ("XPBusiness_AI", ["MVVM", "网络请求"]),
            ("XPBase_Common", ["通用性", "业务逻辑"]),
            ("UnknownModule", ["编码规范", "单元测试"])
        ]

        for module, expected_keywords in module_test_cases:
            suggestions = self.adapter._get_module_coding_suggestions(module)

            # 检查是否包含预期关键词
            suggestion_text = " ".join(suggestions)
            for keyword in expected_keywords:
                assert keyword in suggestion_text, f"Module {module} should contain keyword '{keyword}'"

    @patch('scripts.standards_validator.StandardsValidator.validate_project')
    def test_validate_code_standards_error_handling(self, mock_validate):
        """测试代码标准验证错误处理"""
        mock_validate.side_effect = Exception("验证失败")

        result = self.adapter.validate_code_standards()

        assert result["status"] == "error"
        assert "验证失败" in result["error"]
        assert result["total_violations"] == 0
